main.description: Configuration record for a hyperboard, wrapping an underlying activity or collection with visual presentation settings. Stored in the creator's PDS.

subject.description: Reference to the org.hypercerts.claim.activity or org.hypercerts.claim.collection this board visualizes.

config.description: Board-level visual configuration (background, colors, aspect ratio).

contributorOverrides.description: Per-contributor visual presentation overrides for this board.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.

boardConfig.description: Visual configuration for a hyperboard's background, colors, and layout.

backgroundImage.description: Background image as a URI or image blob.

backgroundGrayscale.description: Whether the background is rendered in grayscale. Default: true.

backgroundColor.description: Background color as a hex string (e.g. '#ffffff').

borderColor.description: Border color as a hex string (e.g. '#000000').

grayscaleImages.description: Whether contributor images are rendered in grayscale. Default: false.

imageShape.description: Shape used to crop contributor images on this board.

aspectRatio.description: Display aspect ratio of the board.

contributorOverride.description: Visual presentation override for a specific contributor within a board.

contributor.description: Identifies the contributor being styled. A strong reference to an org.hypercerts.claim.contributorInformation record, or a contributorIdentity (DID or identifier string) for contributors without a dedicated record.

displayName.description: Display name override for this contributor on this board.

image.description: Avatar or face image override for this contributor on this board, as a URI or image blob.

video.description: Video for this contributor, as a URI (embed/direct link) or uploaded video blob.

hoverImage.description: Image overlay shown when hovering over this contributor, as a URI or image blob.

hoverIframeUrl.description: Iframe overlay shown when hovering over this contributor.

url.description: Click-through link URL for this contributor.
